title: New Video and Save the Date!
excerpt: Finished up a video that I wasn't sure I was going to upload with the entire introduction, but I felt the need to just express how important I think it is to stay positive during tough times. I appreciate so…
body: Finished up a video that I wasn't sure I was going to upload with the entire introduction, but I felt the need to just express how important I think it is to stay positive during tough times. I appreciate so much the sense of community that comes with crafting and creativity. Most of the time, it's so supportive and the dialogue it creates is so engaging. I've been loving scripting these quotes and teaching brush lettering classes in person. And I am so excited to be launching a self-paced online workshop on August 4. So save the date! For now, here's another video in my Brush Lettering series on YouTube.
